channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Mon May 11: Focus on AI Tools and Frameworks for LLMs
item.description: Today's research highlights a surge in AI platforms and frameworks designed to enhance the deployment and management of large language models (LLMs). Projects like 'sglang' and 'mlflow' emphasize the growing need for robust tools that streamline AI workflows and improve model observability.
